---
name: "❓ Question to Developers"
about: Ask a technical question or seek clarification about kumir3-core internals
title: "[Q] <subject>"
labels: [question, technical-debt]
---

## 📝 Topic

What part of the project is your question about? (e.g., Lexer, Executor, Rust FFI, build system)

## 🔍 Your Question

Please describe what you would like to know or clarify. Be as specific as possible.

## 💡 Context / What you’ve tried

To help us give you a better answer, please provide some background:

- Why are you asking this? (e.g., you are trying to implement a new feature, or you are curious about a specific design choice).
- Have you looked at the source code? If so, which file/function are you looking at?
- Is there a specific part of the documentation that is unclear?

## 💻 Code Reference (if applicable)

If your question refers to a specific piece of code in the repository, please link it or paste it here:

```rust
// Example: src\shared\lexer.rs line 42

```

## 📎 Additional Context

Add any other information, diagrams, or links that might help us understand your question.

---

**Note:** If you think you've found a bug, please use the **Bug Report** template instead. 🦀
